ground_truth.description: Person takes first sip from beer glass, clear tilt and mouth contact visible.

mock_response.reason_short: Glass tilts significantly between frames, mouth is near rim, and motion indicates active drinking.

last_run.reasoning: Frame 1 (0.0s) shows the glass held upright with no tilt, mouth not near the glass. Frame 2 (2.3s) shows the glass tilted (>20° from vertical), rim in contact with lips, and liquid flow/swallowing motion. The glass moves upward then tilts, meeting all criteria. Beer fill level is full, so first sip is valid. Holding near mouth without tilt (Frame 1) is not drinking, but Frame 2 confirms active drinking.
last_run.reason_short: Frame 2 shows glass tilted (>20°), rim in contact with lips, liquid flow, and upward motion across frames.
